dialogueLines.text: Barista! A vision of splendor has struck me like a cinnamon‑scented comet—CARROT CAKE! A towering ode to vegetable glory!
Carrot cake's simple enough. If it's good, customers will order it. What's your angle this time?
Angle? Oh Barista, this is no mere angle—this is a crescendo of flavor! Moist layers kissed with spice, crowned with creamy clouds!
Alright. But we need structure. Proper ratios. No 'clouds' unless you mean actual frosting.
Of course I mean frosting! Clouds of dairy delight! Puffing like whipped snowdrifts atop a confectionary mountain!
Okay. Cream cheese frosting. Classic. We can add subtle twists once the base is stable.
A twist! Perhaps… a swirl of citrus radiance? A drizzle of sunshine itself?
If by 'sunshine' you mean orange zest, sure. But keep the quantities sane.
But Barista… the last time I zested citrus, I grated my own thumb! The agony still echoes through me!
That's because you were shouting dramatic monologues while using a microplane.
I am a creature of PASSION, Barista! The zest demanded theatrics! And in return, it punished me!
We'll do it together. I'll handle the zest. You stay… emotionally stable. Or try to.
Very well… I shall restrain my glorious fervor—for the sake of culinary precision.
Good. Now about the spices—nutmeg, cinnamon, maybe a little clove?
Yes…! The triumvirate of aromatic destiny. A fragrant spell potent enough to soothe weary souls.
If it sells well, it'll soothe the café's finances too.
Barista! With this carrot cake, we shall inspire the world—one enchanted slice at a time!
I'll settle for inspiring customers to come back tomorrow. But sure… let's make magic.
